name: Respite Strict Break
description: Companion actuator for the Respite break reminder. When Respite starts a strict break it asks this extension to black out the screen and take a modal grab inside gnome-shell, suppressing Alt+Tab, Super and the overview so the break cannot be worked through. Hold Esc for 3 seconds as an emergency escape. All timer logic lives in the Respite daemon; this extension only locks and unlocks on its command over D-Bus.
